mnemonics.title: Configuration Tool Characteristics
mnemonics.content: APCS: Ansible (YAML), Puppet (Manifests), Chef (Recipes), Salt (States) - Each tool has its own way to define desired state

mnemonics.title: Idempotency Remember
mnemonics.content: IDEMPOTENT: I Don't Expect Multiple Executions Producing Unexpected Things - Same input = Same output

mnemonics.title: IaC Benefits
mnemonics.content: FACT: Fast, Automated, Consistent, Testable - Infrastructure as Code provides these benefits

acronyms.usage: Managing infrastructure through code definitions rather than manual processes
Repository for tracking IT assets and their relationships
Managing and provisioning infrastructure through machine-readable files
Protocol used by agentless tools like Ansible to connect to remote systems
Protocol for managing Windows systems remotely in agentless configurations
Human-readable data serialization used in Ansible playbooks

visualTips.visualization: Draw two diagrams: (1) Agent-based: Central Server → Agent Software → Managed Node; (2) Agentless: Central Server → SSH/WinRM → Managed Node (no agent)
Pull Model: Managed Node requests config from Server; Push Model: Server pushes config to Managed Node. Draw arrows showing direction of communication.
Show three columns: Desired State → Actual State → Drift Detection. If Desired ≠ Actual, drift has occurred.
Draw a loop: Apply Config → Check State → If not desired, apply again → Same final result regardless of iterations

analogies.analogy: Like a light switch - turning it ON whether it's currently OFF or already ON always results in the same final state: ON
Like a garden getting weeds - what you planted (desired state) slowly differs from what grows (actual state) without regular maintenance
Like a recipe - just as a recipe ensures consistent dish output, IaC ensures consistent infrastructure deployment
Like throwing away a spoiled dish and cooking a fresh one rather than trying to fix the old one
Like a ship's captain (Git) giving orders that the crew (automation) must follow exactly
